name: AVL List GmbH
h1: AVL List's GCC footprint in India
lede: AVL List runs three capability centers across two Indian cities. New Delhi and Gurugram, covering it, manufacturing and R&D, built over 24 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one AVL List office in India. We map three, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: AVL List GmbH GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: AVL List runs 3 verified GCC centers across 2 Indian cities (New Delhi, Gurugram), covering it, manufacturing and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

about.description: AVL List's India footprint covers New Delhi and Gurugram, spanning it, manufacturing and R&D. The centers deliver IT and R&D and ER&D for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Automotive Engineering and Consulting, Automotive Engineering Services

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all fourteen decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does AVL List operate in India?
faq.a: AVL List operates 3 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AVL List have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AVL List's India GCC footprint spans New Delhi and Gurugram.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does AVL List run in India?
faq.a: AVL List runs it, manufacturing and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AVL List's India GCCs?
faq.a: AVL List's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AVL List's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 14 leaders at AVL List's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
